title: DigitalItem
description: A digitized item in NYPL Digital Collections — the core object of NYPL's own public Digital Collections API (api.repo.nypl.org/api/v2). Reconciles the item / MODS / captures / rights responses (items/search, items/{uuid}, items/mods/{uuid}, items/rights/{uuid}) into one resource. Keyed on the NYPL UUID. Metadata is exposed via a real, token-authenticated public API — the reason NYPL is this project's counter-example.

uuid.description: NYPL Digital Collections UUID — the primary key across the Digital Collections API.

typeOfResource.description: MODS typeOfResource (e.g. still image, text, cartographic).

names.description: Associated agents (creator, contributor) from MODS name.

division.description: NYPL research division holding the original (ResearchDivision), e.g. 'Photography Collection, Miriam and Ira D. Wallach Division'.

publicDomain.description: Whether the item is in the public domain (drives the publicDomainOnly search filter).

imageLinks.description: Capture image URLs at various sizes (items/{uuid} captures / imageLinks).

captureCount.description: Number of digitized captures (pages/views) under the item.

itemLink.description: Public digitalcollections.nypl.org page for the item.
